title: Emergency Dental Care * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Emergency Dental Care * Native American Community 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-time pediatric dentist, with access to local specialists for emergency referrals. Capable of managing comprehensive patient care in the clinic and coordinating referrals for specialized treatment. Operates a mobile medical and dental bus twice a month at various locations on the Warm Springs Reservation. Offers a range of pediatric specialty programs, including the Silver Nitrate Project for children ages 0–6 with active tooth decay. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm, Wednesday 1pm-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm. Mobile medical and dental bus locations and times vary. (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental care. 12750 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Native American or Alaskan Native Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (971) 347-3009 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive physical, mental, and dental care services. Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTHCARE SERVICES CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS DENTAL PROGRAM NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW DENTAL CLINIC YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER
